benchmarkOutline.keyword: family home appliances 3 to 5 people buying guide

topic.angle: Capacity-first cross-category guide for families: larger fridge and washer tiers, shared screens, air quality for kids rooms, and cleanup load

instructions: Write one bilingual draft (en+ko, draft:true) with contentProfile:explainer. Writing mode: benchmark. Tone: question-led. Follow docs/templates/explainer.md and docs/CONTENT_STANDARDS.md. Season priority: summer; active events: 여름·방학, 폭염·냉방. CROSS-CATEGORY ANGLE (household-type): 3–5 person household / 3~5인 가구. Cover multiple product categories in ONE article — anchor categories: refrigerators, washing-machines, television, air-purifiers, cordless-vacuums. Do NOT write a single-product deep dive; each section compares categories for this household/price/capacity theme. Suggested slug: 2026-family-3-5-home-essentials-explainer-guide. Frontmatter: contentAngle: family-3-5-person, topicId: meta-family-3-5-person. Use the benchmark outline in this request (outline-first). Paraphrase all sections; never copy SERP text. Publish-ready before complete: description 50–160 chars (en+ko), "## FAQ" / "## 자주 묻는 질문" with ≥3 ### Q&A pairs (profile minimum), coverImage on disk, profile template sections. Draft frontmatter: set createdAt to now; date = today KST (publish overwrites at go-live) — never future date on buffer drafts. Run `npm run content:integrity:repair` (or `node scripts/check-integrity.mjs {slug} --draft --repair`) — must pass with zero errors. Do NOT use `npm run content:validate` alone (published posts only). Then set status to complete.
